message:
perf(e2e): use prepared statements in large txn benchmarks, fix clippy lints

large_txn_bench.rs:
- Replace per-row `format!` + `execute` with a single prepared statement
  using `?1` parameter binding and `execute_with_params`. This eliminates
  100k string allocations per benchmark iteration and measures INSERT
  throughput without SQL generation overhead.

bd_2y306_4_chain_memory_benchmarks.rs:
- Replace `if let Err(MvccError::Busy) = ...` with `== Err(MvccError::Busy)`
  to satisfy clippy's `redundant_pattern_matching` lint (the enum variant
  has no fields to destructure).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
